challenge.title: Korak 4
challenge.description:
Ako je izvor citata veb stranica, možete ga navesti pomoću atributa cite. Vrednost ovog atributa treba da bude važeća URL adresa. Iako ovaj atribut ne menja prikaz citata u bloku, veoma je koristan jer pruža čitačima ekrana i pretraživačima više informacija o citatu.

Evo primera inline elementa za citat sa atributom cite:

<p>
  Nancy said,
  <q cite="https://example.com">Learning is fun!</q>
</p>

Dodajte atribut cite na inline element za citat sa ovom URL adresom:

https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/learn-to-code-book/

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Quincy's Tips for Getting a Developer Job

Learning to code is hard, but as Quincy Larson says, You can become a developer.

tests.testString:
const qEl = document.querySelector('h1 + p > q');
assert.exists(qEl?.getAttribute('cite'));

tests.text: The cite attribute of your q element should have the value https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/learn-to-code-book/.
tests.testString:
const qEl = document.querySelector('h1 + p > q');
assert.equal(qEl?.getAttribute('cite'), 'https://www.freecodecamp.org/news/learn-to-code-book/');

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Quincy's Tips for Getting a Developer Job

Learning to code is hard, but as Quincy Larson says, You can become a developer.

Envisioning Success

Can you imagine what it would be like to be a successful developer? To have built software systems that people rely upon?

—Quincy Larson, How to Learn to Code and Get a Developer Job [Full Book]

Importance of Networking

So much of getting a job is who you know.

It's OK to be an introvert, but you do need to push your boundaries.

Create GitHub, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Discord accounts.

Go to tech meetups and conferences. Travel if you have to.

Importance of Building a Reputation

Share short video demos of your projects.

Keep applying to speak at bigger and bigger conferences.

Hang out at hackerspaces and help people who are even newer to coding than you.
